# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **New platforms and performance**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 adds Vulkan/Silk.NET support, FreeType on Nano Server, and several performance fixes. This release expands platform reach with a new Vulkan binding package and FreeType-backed font support on Windows Nano Server. It also includes a memory-leak fix in raster image creation and two performance improvements in text encoding and runtime-effect uniforms.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## API Surface

- **New SkiaSharp.Vulkan.Silk.NET package** — A dedicated NuGet package integrates SkiaSharp with Vulkan via the Silk.NET bindings, enabling GPU-accelerated rendering on Linux and Android Vulkan back-ends. ([#4527](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4527))
- **FreeType font support on Windows Nano Server** — Nano Server containers lack the GDI font stack; SkiaSharp now falls back to FreeType so font rendering works in that environment. — ❤️ [@jeffska](https://github.com/jeffska) ([#4280](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4280))

## Bug Fixes

- **Memory leak in SKImage.Create raster failure path fixed** — A CoTaskMem pixel buffer was not freed when the underlying Skia raster-image creation failed, causing a native memory leak. The buffer is now released on the failure path. ([#4455](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4455))

## Lifecycle & Internals

- **Avoid intermediate string allocation in GetEncodedText null-terminated path** — The hot path that reads null-terminated text no longer allocates an intermediate string, reducing GC pressure on text-heavy workloads. ([#4498](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4498))
- **Pre-size uniform lookup map in SKRuntimeEffectUniforms** — The uniform-name lookup dictionary is now sized to the known count at construction time, eliminating rehash allocations for typical runtime-effect usage. ([#4512](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4512))
- **Solutions converted to .slnx format** — All .sln solution files have been migrated to the lighter .slnx format for improved tooling compatibility. ([#4528](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4528))

## Platform

- **Containerized test legs added: Azure Linux, Alpine/musl, Nano Server** — CI now runs a full test matrix on Azure Linux, Alpine (musl libc), and Windows Nano Server containers, catching platform-specific regressions earlier. ([#4515](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4515))

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!
